name: Mud Pie#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cookie crumbs and melted butter in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a greased 9-inch pie pan.
3. Refrigerate until set.
4. When chilled, spoon half of the softened ice cream onto the crust.
5. Pour half of the Mud Sauce over the ice cream.
6. Add another layer of ice cream and top with the remaining Mud Sauce.
7. Stir the Mud Sauce ingredients in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens. Add vanilla after removing the sauce from heat.
8. Cool the Mud Sauce enough so it doesn't melt the ice cream when pouring.
9. Top with Garnish and freeze.
10. For Garnish: Whip the cream, stir in powdered sugar and Kahlua liqueur. Decorate the top of the Mud Pie with whipped cream and finely chopped nuts. Freeze solid.
Ideas:
- Double the recipe and use a greased 9 x 13-inch pan. This should serve 24 people.
- If you don't like nuts on top, try chocolate curls. Use a block of chocolate and peel along one edge with a potato peeler. Use chocolate at room temperature to avoid pieces.
